minimum_input: Timestamp, endpoint or app feature, symbol(s), market state if known, raw output.

purpose: Determine whether the issue is batch-specific or symbol-specific.
minimum_input: One common equity such as MSFT or SPY.
expected_output: Success or failure with raw output.

purpose: Check whether the reported symbol is missing or failing by itself.
expected_output: Returned symbol and field set, or precise failure state.

purpose: Compare affected symbol against multiple security types.
minimum_input: Representative symbols list from project data.

purpose: Separate Yahoo behavior from URL/symbol encoding issues.
minimum_input: Encoded and unencoded variants for symbols with ^, =, or - characters.

retest_step: Retest at a different time window
purpose: Separate persistent behavior from temporary rate limits or market-state timing.
minimum_input: Second capture at least one different time window later.

purpose: Apply classification rules after evidence is gathered.
minimum_input: Evidence level, false-positive checks, classification candidate.
expected_output: Confirmed change, app behavior note, needs retest, duplicate, or rejected false positive.
